atomicity.message: The staged payload is one Phase 2 unit: land-14 verifier prompt generator. It contains only verifier prompts command/robot-help plumbing, the internal prompt packet generator, and direct tests. It intentionally excludes begin/submit ingestion, config defaults, transcript storage, runtime doctor, attestation query, beads, completion verification, and other later land units.

conditions.message: The staged prompt-generator payload is formatted, whitespace-clean, and covered by focused command/backpressure tests plus the full suite.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status/stat matched the packet: cmd/burpvalve/main.go modified; cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go, and internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go added; 579 insertions.
git diff --cached --check exited 0.
go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'VerifierPrompt|Prompt|Profile' passed.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Verifier|Prompt|Robots|Help' passed.
go test ./... passed across cmd/burpvalve and internal packages.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-land-14-verifier-prompt-generator-a52 --profile ntm --condition lint-rules --json produced schema_version=1, command='verifier prompts', profile='ntm', one lint-rules packet, and response_schema.verifier.separate_context=true.

conditions.message: The staged slice is narrowly the verifier prompt generator and contains no duplicate or unrelated implementation paths; generated packets preserve read-only instructions and unknown placeholder responses.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly: M cmd/burpvalve/main.go; A cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go; A internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go; A internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go.
git diff --cached --check exited 0.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --feature project-readiness-kit-land-14-verifier-prompt-generator-a52 --profile ntm --condition dry --json in an isolated staged temp repo emitted one packet with condition_id dry; prompt contained Do not fabricate and Read-only; response_schema had verifier.kind unknown, subagent_confirmed false, verdict unknown.

conditions.message: D7 is preserved: authorization language is present only as delegation context, while generated response schemas remain unknown/unconfirmed until a real verifier supplies evidence.
evidence: Inspected staged internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go: VerifierAuthorizationText includes Do not fabricate subagent confirmation; buildVerifierPromptPacket initializes verifier.kind unknown, subagent_confirmed false, verdict unknown, and placeholder evidence/message/next_action.

Full-packet command emitted schema_version=1, command=verifier prompts, profile=ntm, 13 packets, 4 staged_payload entries; first packet authorization matched Do not fabricate, response_schema verifier.kind=unknown, subagent_confirmed=false, verdict=unknown, and profile notes said the generator did not launch NTM/swarm.
git diff grep for spawn/launch/fabricate/subagent/authorization found only expected prompt-generator warnings and tests, not confirmation laundering.

conditions.message: The new generator and CLI surfaces have focused tests for packet construction, profile/filter behavior, errors, JSON/human output, and robot help.
evidence: Inspected staged tests: internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go covers BuildVerifierPrompts policy/payload/response schema, profile normalization/condition filtering, and actionable errors.
Inspected staged cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go: covers verifier prompts JSON and human output plus unsupported profile and robot-help documentation.
In the isolated staged temp repo, go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'VerifierPrompt|Prompt|Profile' passed and go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Verifier|Prompt|Robots|Help' passed.

conditions.message: The staged implementation is complete for unit 14: command registration, robot/help docs, core packet generation, and targeted/full tests are present and passing.
evidence: git diff --cached --stat showed 4 staged files and 579 insertions, matching the packet's expected payload.
go run ./cmd/burpvalve verifier prompts --help in the isolated staged temp repo rendered the generator description and --condition, --feature, --json, --profile, and --root flags.
go test ./... passed in the isolated staged temp repo across cmd/burpvalve and all internal packages.

conditions.message: Generated packets carry concrete staged-payload, policy, success-criteria, read-only, and response-schema fields so verifier evidence can be returned without inventing confirmation.
evidence: Full JSON command emitted top-level keys command, feature, notes, packets, profile, schema_version, staged_payload; packet keys included authorization, condition_file, condition_id, profile_notes, read_only_expectation, response_schema, staged_payload, success_criteria, and verifier_policy.
jq over /tmp/land14-prompts.json showed staged_payload count 4 with statuses modified/added for the four expected paths.

Response schema in /tmp/land14-dry.json contained condition_id dry, condition_file backpressure/dry.md, verifier_policy independent_required, verifier.kind unknown, subagent_confirmed false, verdict unknown, and placeholder evidence.

conditions.message: The staged payload is limited to the land-14 verifier prompts command, robot-help docs, and tests; later units are not implemented here.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status matched only cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go, and internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go.
Inspected staged cmd/burpvalve/main.go: root adds newVerifierCommand; verifier subcommand only exposes prompts with root/feature/condition/profile/json flags and calls BuildVerifierPrompts.

Targeted staged-diff grep for verifier begin/submit, transcript, runtime doctor, config defaults, attestation browsing, beads, completion verification, and future surfaces found only expected verifier prompts/help/test references, not implementations.

conditions.message: No governed destructive-operation surface exists in this staged payload.
evidence: The staged payload adds a read-only verifier prompts command and prompt generator; it does not run verifier agents, write response files, stage/unstage files, commit, submit attestations, deploy, migrate data, or mutate external systems.
Staged diff grep found no rm -rf, git reset, curl/wget/http call, deploy/production mutation, os.Remove, WriteFile, or other destructive command implementation in the payload.
Robot notes and command help state that burpvalve verifier prompts is read-only and does not spawn subagents.

conditions.message: Packet generation preserves staged payload entries, condition identity, condition files, verifier policies, profile normalization, and actionable errors without silently dropping requested filters.
evidence: Inspected staged verifier_prompts.go: BuildVerifierPrompts normalizes profile, builds a pre-commit staged plan, errors for no feature/no staged payload/no matching condition, and copies staged payload into both set and packet objects.
jq over generated full JSON showed 13 packets and 4 staged_payload entries; jq over the dry-filtered JSON showed exactly 1 packet with condition_id dry and verifier_policy independent_required.

internal/backpressure verifier prompt tests passed; inspected tests include fake staged rename/delete/modify payload preservation and unsupported profile/no payload/ambiguous/missing-condition error cases.

conditions.message: The generator is read-only, emits path/status/policy metadata rather than staged blob contents or credentials, and explicitly forbids mutation/fabricated confirmation.
evidence: Inspected staged verifier_prompts.go: BuildVerifierPrompts reads staged plan data and renders prompts via path/status/old_path fields; it does not open or embed arbitrary file contents in prompts.
Targeted staged-diff grep for credential/secret/password/token/api key/Bearer/content/excerpt/blob found no credential handling or staged-content embedding beyond fake test fixture content maps.

Robot notes and prompt text inspected in cmd/burpvalve/main.go and generated JSON state verifier prompts is read-only and does not spawn subagents; read_only_expectation says do not edit, stage, commit, or fabricate confirmation.

conditions.message: No governed visual surface exists in this staged payload.
evidence: Staged paths are Go CLI and internal backpressure files only: cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/verifier_test.go, internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts.go, and internal/backpressure/verifier_prompts_test.go.
The staged diff contains no browser UI, CSS, screenshots, SVG/canvas, images, or visual demo assets.

conditions.message: Prompt size is bounded by staged path/status metadata and enabled conditions; the command uses the existing pre-commit plan path and no new fanout, concurrency, or content-dumping loop.
evidence: Generated full packet JSON from the isolated staged temp repo reported 13 packets and 4 staged_payload entries for the current slice, with no staged file excerpts in packet prompts.
Inspected staged renderVerifierPromptPacket: it writes feature/condition/policy/read-only fields and enumerates staged file path/status/old_path only.
go test ./... passed in the isolated staged temp repo; targeted command JSON generation completed successfully for full ntm profile and dry-filtered output.

conditions.message: The generated handoff packets direct verifier behavior without claiming autonomous verification or launching subagents; they preserve the boundary between authorization to request verification and actual verifier evidence.
evidence: Inspected verifierPromptProfileNotes: native/ntm/hermes/manual notes all state the generator did not spawn, launch, send, or verify and instruct the runtime/operator to preserve returned evidence.
Generated ntm JSON profile notes matched did not launch NTM or a swarm; response_schema remained unknown/unconfirmed until a verifier fills it.

Robot help notes in staged cmd/burpvalve/main.go say spawn read-only verifier subagents yourself when runtime permits and route real verifier output into response_schema; Do not fabricate subagent confirmation.
